3208960.name: Tale of Exorcists
3208960.description:
In 1044, Ly Thai Tong Emperor led his army to defend the south of Dai Viet against the Champa attack. Prince Ly Nhat Ton (later becoming Ly Thanh Tong Emperor in 1054 ) temporarily took over as regent in place of his father. On the far east of Dai Viet, people on Bach Long Dau (White Dragon Head) island call for help when the demon attacks them. Prince Ly Nhat Ton sent the Phuc Ma Ngu Su (Demon Exorcist) to investigate and support the people.


Lac Viet Adventures: Tales of Exorcist is a stunning 2D side-scrolling action RPG set in a fictitious Vietnam world, during Ly Dynasty with the infestation of vicious demon monsters. Play as a skilled exorcist against chaotic evil to fight your way through the brutal world, and experience unforeseen entanglements of complex beings.

Art Direction
All hand-drawn Asian ink painting styles, adapting Vietnam puppet style and ink, with many atmospheric scenes.

Combat System
Use your sword and blade to execute demons and monsters with tactical combat mechanics in hand-drawn frame-by-frame action design.

Storyline
Experience a complicated journey with joy and sorrow as an exorcist.
3208960.supported_languages:
英语*, 越南语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
